## Summary

A Next.js 16 app is scaffolded in the repo with the requested stack. Because the root already had `.specstory/` and `.cursorindexingignore`, `create-next-app` ran in a temp folder and files were synced to the root.

### Stack

| Requirement | Implementation |
|---|---|
| App Router | `src/app/` |
| TypeScript | `tsconfig.json` with strict mode |
| Tailwind CSS v4 | `src/app/globals.css`, PostCSS config |
| Biome | `biome.json`, `npm run lint` |
| npm | `package-lock.json` |
| `src/` directory | `src/app/` |
| `@/*` alias | `"@/*": ["./src/*"]` in `tsconfig.json` |

### Home page

The default Next.js template was replaced with a title-only page:

```1:7:src/app/page.tsx
export default function Home() {
  return (
    <main>
      <h1>Customer Financial Health</h1>
    </main>
  );
}
```

### Files added

- **Config:** `package.json`, `tsconfig.json`, `next.config.ts`, `biome.json`, `postcss.config.mjs`, `.gitignore`
- **App:** `src/app/layout.tsx`, `src/app/page.tsx`, `src/app/globals.css`
- **Assets:** `public/` (default SVGs from the template)
- **Docs:** `README.md`, `AGENTS.md`, `CLAUDE.md`

Also added a `typecheck` script (`tsc --noEmit`) and set the package name to `customer-financial-health`.

### Verification

All three checks passed:

```
npm run lint      ✓  (Biome — 9 files, no issues)
npm run typecheck ✓  (tsc --noEmit)
npm run build     ✓  (Next.js 16.2.9 — static `/` route)
```

Run `npm run dev` to start the dev server. Say if you want this committed.

---

_**User**_

/ac use the Branch feat/scaffold
